[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Pick-Up Recruitment starts 2/5 (Sun)!
Target Pick-Up Student: 3★ Chise (Swimsuit)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 2/5 (Sun) 02:00 AM–2/14 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
